# Photosynthesis process explained simply

## Short Teaching Summary
Photosynthesis process explained simply: In a fishbowl analogy, the plant uses carbon dioxide, water, and sunlight to make sugar and releases oxygen back into the water. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
